name: Orange'n Lemon Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 2 Split chicken breasts (4 pieces with ribs), about 2 1/2 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Start the fire in the grill, placing the rack 4 inches above the coals (see note).
2. Melt butter over medium heat in a 1-quart saucepan; add garlic; cook for 1 minute, stirring until golden.
3. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice, lemon peel, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour the mixture over chicken breasts in a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking dish; let stand at least 10 minutes or until ready to grill.
5. Place a sheet of foil on the hot grill rack.
6. Remove chicken from marinade, reserving it for later use.
7. Arrange breasts, skin side down, on the foil and cook, covered with the grill cover, for 10 minutes.
8. Turn breasts over; cook, covered, for an additional 15 minutes until cooked through, brushing occasionally with the reserved marinade.
9. One or two minutes before the end of cooking time, brush breasts with orange marmalade to glaze.
10. Serve when chicken is golden brown.
